examples: Players use a haptic device such as a joystick to control the game.
Existing haptic devices use rotary motors with off-centre weights to generate such tremors.
Apple patented their own version of a haptic display that shows — what else — a full-size keyboard.
Meanwhile, the haptic feedback for touchscreen typing is cranked to 11 and significantly unhelpful.
The Thrive's got a haptic display and a button to lock the screen orientation.
